summary: Completed testing of login with email/username feature and landmark capitalization. All 5 features verified successfully - Login API accepts identifier field, Frontend shows 'Email or Username *' label, Landmark capitalization works in registration, Admin cleanup endpoint works, and Admin login continues to work separately.

issues: React controlled/uncontrolled input warning when filling landmark field - not a blocking issue but should be cleaned up

1_login_form_label.details: Login form correctly shows 'Email or Username *' label with User icon (not Mail icon) for regular user login

2_login_api_identifier_field.details: Login API (/api/auth/login) accepts 'identifier' field that works with both email (with @) and username (without @). Backend correctly determines login type by checking for @ symbol.

3_landmark_capitalization_registration.details: Landmark field in registration form correctly applies capitalizeWords function - typing 'near central park mall' produces 'Near Central Park Mall'

4_landmark_capitalization_checkout.details: Checkout.jsx lines 260 and 279 include 'landmark' in capitalizeFields array for both handleBillingChange and handleShippingChange functions

5_admin_cleanup_endpoint.details: DELETE /api/admin/cleanup-users-without-username works with confirm=false (preview mode showing count) and confirm=true (actual deletion). Returns appropriate response structure.

6_admin_login_separate.details: Admin login continues to use 'Admin Email *' label and 'email' field name, separate from user login. Admin credentials (contact.us@centraders.com / 110078) work correctly.

backend_test_results.skipped_reason: test_login_returns_username_in_response - could not complete full registration flow in test environment

AuthPage.jsx_login_form.line_879_880: Label correctly shows 'Email or Username *' for user login, 'Admin Email *' for admin
AuthPage.jsx_login_form.line_889_890: Input name is 'loginIdentifier' for user login, 'email' for admin
AuthPage.jsx_login_form.line_886: User icon (not Mail icon) displays for user login mode

AuthContext.jsx_login_function.line_77: login function sends 'identifier' field instead of 'email'

models.py_UserLogin.line_223_225: UserLogin model uses 'identifier' field as expected

auth.py_login_endpoint.line_341_351: Login endpoint checks if identifier contains @ to determine email vs username login

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React controlled/uncontrolled input warning appears when filling landmark field in registration. Consider initializing landmark state to empty string instead of undefined.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Login now accepts both email (with @) and username (without @) via the 'identifier' field in UserLogin model. Admin login remains separate with 'email' field. Landmark field capitalization is applied in both AuthPage.jsx (registration) and Checkout.jsx (billing/shipping). Admin cleanup endpoint at DELETE /api/admin/cleanup-users-without-username can preview or delete users without usernames.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This was feature verification, all features working as expected
